title: Quorum-Based Replication
description: Master the principles of quorum-based replication for distributed data stores. Configure N, W, and R values to tune the balance between data durability, consistency, and read/write latency.
objectives: Master the principles of quorum-based replication for distributed data stores.
Configure N, W, and R values to tune the balance between data durability, consistency, and read/write latency.
